postalAddress.source: (project convention: Parliament Office postal address used across many MPs when electorate office address unavailable)
postalAddress.notes: Parliament.nz MP contact page blocked by Radware captcha from this environment; ACT profile/contact pages did not provide a specific electorate/parliament postal address for Parmjeet Parmar. Using standard Parliament Office postal address as fallback.

donationMethod.details: No public, MP-specific donation method found. ACT provides a party donation form.
donationMethod.notes: Checked ACT donation page; MP-specific donation link not located.

sourcesChecked.notes: Blocked by Radware captcha / could not access contact details.
ACT profile shows electorate office headings but no address; only party authorisation footer address.
Contact form page does not list an electorate/parliament postal address for Parmjeet Parmar (only party authorisation footer address).
